features: EFFORTLESSLY PREVENTS BUILD UP: Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner works to prevent the build-up of detergent and food residues that can create nasty odours. Regular use keeps the dishwasher's interior fresh, leaving dishes cleaner.

PROLONGS APPLIANCE LIFE: By removing limescale and grime, this powerful cleaner helps prevent costly breakdowns. Enjoy an efficient dishwasher that performs like new, thanks to this essential kitchen cleaner.
PERFECT FOR BUSY HOUSEHOLDS: Made for households that rely on dishwashers daily, this deep cleaner saves you time and hassle by keeping your appliance clean and in top working condition.

SINGLE USE CONVENIENCE: Each 75g sachet is designed for one-time use, making it simple to achieve a powerful clean without needing to measure or prepare multiple products. Just pour and start the cycle!
SUITABLE FOR LARGE APPLIANCES: This cleaner is ideal for all standard-size dishwashers, giving you peace of mind that it's safe and effective for the largest appliances in your home.
EASY TO USE: Designed with convenience in mind, just fill the dosing compartment with the powder, sprinkle the rest at the bottom, and run a standard cycle. It’s a no-fuss solution to deep cleaning.
POWERFUL HOUSEHOLD ESSENTIAL: Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner is a kitchen essential that helps keep your household appliances at their best, ensuring they perform well and provide reliably clean dishes.
ODOUR ELIMINATOR: Regular use of this cleaner will not only improve your dishwasher's performance but also eliminate unwanted odours, leaving your kitchen smelling fresh and inviting.
HIGH PERFORMANCE KITCHEN CLEANER: As part of your cleaning products routine, this dishwasher cleaner packs a powerful punch, tackling limescale and grime that other cleaners often leave behind.

ENHANCES CLEANING POWER: With Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner, your appliance can operate at its best, ensuring sparkling, residue-free dishes every time. By removing hidden grime, it boosts cleaning performance, so each wash leaves dishes flawlessly clean.
description: Product Description Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner Descaler will keep your dishwasher hygienically clean, limescale build up over time, particularly in hard water areas can affect the performance and damage the heating element shortening the working life of them. Formulated to remove 100 Percentof all limescale, prolonging the appliance life. Pack single use sachet Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: 15-30% Oxygen based bleaching agents, <5% Anionic Surfactants, Perfume, Linalool, Limonene Directions * Fill the dosing compartment with the powder * Pour remaining powder onto the bottom of the dishwasher * Select standard wash cycle and press start * Do not fill with dishes and do not use any other detergent See more
